title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 275.200 - Exempt from general corporation law — exceptions
text:
275.200.  Exempt from general corporation law — exceptions. — That commodity associations organized under the provisions of this chapter shall be exempt from the limitations, restrictions and burdens imposed upon corporations by any law of this state pertaining to the regulation thereof, except such as are in this chapter specifically set forth.
(RSMo 1939 § 14381) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12723
